chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1734 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.7463/2023 2. For hearing of main case 06-03-2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner has been allowed to join duty with effect from 25.01.2024, however his period of previous two months is un-decided for which he intends to file an application before the competent authority for a decision and requests that if such application is filed, competent authorities may be directed to decide the same expeditiously not later than three months. This proposal has not been opposed by learned AAG. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of having served its purpose. If any application is filed by the petitioner as above, it may be decided in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
